m	Z	
z9 Doctests for NumPy-specific nose/doctest modifications
    >>> 2+2
    <BadExample object at 0x084D05AC>  #random: may vary on your system
    N
I/usr/lib64/python3.9/site-packages/numpy/testing/tests/test_doctesting.py
check_random_directive
    >>> np.array([1,2,3])
    array([1, 2, 3])
    Nr
check_implicit_np
    # whitespace after the 3
    >>> 1+2
    3
    # whitespace before the 7
    >>> 3+4
     7
    Nr
check_whitespace_enabled
 Check that no output does not cause an error.
    This is related to nose bug 445; the numpy plugin changed the
    doctest-result-variable default and therefore hit this bug:
    http://code.google.com/p/python-nose/issues/detail?id=445
    >>> a = 10
    Nr
check_empty_output!
zZ Check skip directive
    The test below should not run
    >>> 1/0 #doctest: +SKIP
    Nr
